title: View Distance Command
description: A lightweight client side mod that lets you change your view distance via an in game command.
body:
# View Distance Command
This is a really simple client side mod that lets you change your minecraft view/render distance with an in game command.

## Important
This mod **requires** the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)  
  
If you want a view distance higher than the Minecraft limit of 32, or are playing on a server with a view distance cap, you can use a mod like [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) to allow larger view distances!

## Command Options
/viewdistance set [distance] - Set your current render distance to [distance]  
/viewdistance get - Prints your current view distance in the chat  
/viewdistance help - Displays the help message (see the help message below!)  

> You can also use the alias `vd` in place of `viewdistance` in all commands!

## Support
If you encounter any issues, please join my [development discord](https://discord.gg/GMkjWd2Kun). I also welcome any suggestions for improving the mod!

## Donation
This mod is coded entirely on my free time so if you like it and want to help me out, consider supporting me!

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/P5P516LAKY)
